title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr Lal PathLabs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr Lal PathLabs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
